title: Write an informal update message
subtitle: Tell a friend what happened.
overview: Use what happened, how you feel, next plan.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I will tell you more later.

items.es: Te cuento rápido: al final conseguí cambiar la cita.
items.en: I will tell you quickly: in the end I managed to change the appointment.

items.es: Primero fue un poco difícil porque no encontraban mi reserva.
items.en: First it was a little difficult because they could not find my reservation.

items.es: Después hablé con otra persona y me ayudó mucho.
items.en: Then I spoke with another person and he/she helped me a lot.

items.es: Me dio mucha alegría porque estaba preocupado.
items.en: It made me very happy because I was worried.

items.es: Luego te cuento más con calma.
items.en: I will tell you more calmly later.
